name: CombatMeter
description: Real-time party DPS/HPS meter with role colours.
author: Stellar

added: Leader team-countdown button — start the game's pull timer for the party straight from the meter header (party-focus, leader only).

Auto-archive is now fully configurable from a dedicated Settings pane (gear icon): master on/off, per-trigger toggles (team wipe, boss phase, combat idle, dungeon stage change), min gap between archives, settle wait, wipe revive-grace and ignore-when-solo, and boss re-cut.
Boss phase 'keep before': choose how many seconds of run-up before your first hit ride into the boss segment (default off = cut exactly at the first hit).
Whole-run replay: the position track now records continuously from the dungeon walk-in through the kill (boss HP reaches 0% on death), and mid-run archives no longer clip it.
Re-uploading an archived run reproduces the exact original upload — summary, full combat detail, and the movement track — even after a game relaunch or if the server-side data was lost.
Copy-link and the History list now use the server's short run URL when available.
changed: Boss-phase archiving now cuts a clean segment at the first boss hit (no more mid-fight re-archiving), and re-attempts after a wipe are captured correctly with your chosen keep-before.
Upload state and run URLs persist across relaunches — retrying an already-uploaded run resolves to its existing link instead of failing.
Role colour and class crest are inferred from your spec when the party roster has no profession data yet.
Requires framework 1.15.0 or newer (uses the new per-plugin data storage for the byte-for-byte re-upload).
